name: memory-graph
description: Unified semantic memory for AI agents — per-repo DuckDB store with semantic recall, typed knowledge graph, auto-crystallized wiki, cross-agent coordination, and pluggable embedding providers (fastembed/ollama/vertex) with built-in benchmark + migration tooling. Ships with the usage protocol as a bundled skill.
installNotes: After install, set MEMORY_GRAPH_WORKSPACE to your project root (or rely on auto-detection from CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR). The DuckDB store is created lazily at <workspace>/.memory-graph/memory.duckdb on first call.
